description: Style NoteThe rising temperature has us all in a tizzy but this stylish pair of sandals is one reason why we love the summer! This season, peep toe sandals and beaded thongs work with dressy shirts and cropped trousers (don't forget to add a statement necklace to this ensemble) catwalk comes up with warm weather footwear essentials that turn traditional fashion styles on its head. This beautifully crafted pair will transform your daily spring wear with a bold yet graceful edge. Product DetailsBrown forefoot strap with metal embellishmentsHeel collar with a zipper and four ankle loops heavily embellished with metallic detailsBrown footbed with printed brandingMini wedge heel with floral grooves at the TPU outsole and a slightly upraised heelMaterial and Care SyntheticWipe with a clean cloth to remove dustDo not store under sunlight
